review_execution.reviewed_input: Provided git diff for RP00.P02.M01.S03 implementation plus validation summary; Claude tools were disabled with --tools "".

findings.title: S03 decision should explicitly guard carried M00 precheck decision
findings.description: Claude noted the S03 prechecker re-derived tenant equality and did not visibly assert the carried allow_metadata_only/precheck_passed flags inside the function body.
findings.recommendation: Add a defense-in-depth assertion or test documenting the intended trust model.
findings.disposition: Added an explicit allow_metadata_only/precheck_passed guard in precheckControlPlanePlanAuthoringTenantBoundary and added a fail-closed test for carried denied decisions.

findings.title: No test for no-Matter-context allow path
findings.description: Claude noted the service allowed matter_id null and matter_tenant_id null when actor/resource tenants match, but no test pinned that branch.
findings.recommendation: Add a test asserting same-tenant firm-level metadata returns allow_metadata_only with no blocked refs.
findings.disposition: Added a firm-level no-Matter-context allow test and mirrored the case in the RP00 validator.

findings.title: Unchanged validation acceptance text should be confirmed for S03
findings.description: Claude could not confirm unchanged completion-gate text was not still S02-specific.
findings.recommendation: Confirm or refresh the text if it describes S02 specifics.
findings.disposition: Confirmed permission_audit is subphase-agnostic and refreshed failure_mode_covered evidence to mention S03 tenant-boundary blocked refs.

parsed_review.summary: Claude approved RP00.P02.M01.S03 with only P3 observations. The review found no P0/P1/P2 blockers and confirmed the implementation is deterministic, no-write, metadata-only, carries contract row and acceptance gate IDs, fails closed on unsafe boundary claims, completes RP00.P02.M01, and hands off to RP00.P02.M02.S01.
parsed_review.residual_risk: Low. Post-review P3 items were fixed or confirmed; no real-data, write, route, service-execution, contract-row drafting, human-approval replacement, or unresolved P0/P1/P2 risk remains.
